title: Sheng Mouth-Organ Family Packet
artifact_focus: free-reed mouth organ L2 V5 packet with traditional side-branch and compact control variants

required_before_public: Select one architecture branch in architecture-choice.md before layout or CAD authority claims.
Record P0 reed-coupon evidence in p0-reed-coupon-log.csv before final reed pitch, onset pressure, pull-down, or cut-ready socket claims.
Record P1 single-pipe control and windchest/leakage evidence before branch promotion beyond L2.
Add reviewed DXF/CAD/design-table authority for the selected branch before fabrication or public-release geometry claims.
Run and record Wolfram/runtime evidence before treating sheng-starter.wl as more than source-only scaffold.

round30_free_reed_guard.fabrication_boundary: No reed dimensions, pull-down data, tuning measurements, or windchest geometry are build-ready until measured P0/P1 evidence and reviewed CAD/DXF/design-table authority exist.
